reviews.review_description:
i like the game, primarily for the weapons that set it apart from other rhythm games.  the staff is the most unusual (well phasers also but i find that hard to play).  the problem though is that the rotate didn't work, despite developers saying how to do it.  this wouldn't be a problem but the default orientation is also 180 degrees from natural.  so you have to play with Palm up instead of palm down, and that means you have no natural rotation further right.  please fix!!!!!  and I'll add back the last star.

the 3d is interesting as well but so far i don't like it as much as synth.  it needs to move faster.  but i do like that it's angle gets higher than synth or holopoint.

i also like that it ranks you against all players of all time.

Great game with a few glaring faults that the developers never addressed:
Some targets get blocked behind each other so playing on difficulties above Hard (and it happens there too) is very frustrating.

They added a fitness option which again could have been great, but once again, they built it out so the targets are often obscured. In competitive rhythm games, I can see all the crazy, but a workout should be difficult by virtue of the elements of the workout, not purposefully making it impossible to see what's coming. 

I still recommend the game and think with some better polish, it could have wound up in the proper app store, but at this point I wouldn't expect any updates or responses from the devs as it seems they've decided to just let the game languish.

Been using SongBeater for a long time now, it's truly amazing for intense cardio workouts.  I'd give it 5 stars if they would make it easy to use custom songs. Another fitness app I use, PowerbeatsVR for instance makes it so easy to use your own music. Just drop mp3 files on a folder and you're good to go. With SongBeater, I've been trying to figure out how to use custom music to no avail. I think you're suppose to convert them first, but the process seems complicated and can't get them to work. SongBeater is more fun than PowerBeats, but I always go back to and prefer PowerBeats because I can listen to any artist that I want. To the Developers: If there is a way to add a feature to use custom mp3's or ogg's easily, please do it. This is the only thing missing in your app to make it truly great in my opinion.
There are no instructions to download custom songs. Smh

reviews.review_title: Fighting the game to get a workout!!
reviews.review_description:
Liked it at first but the targets are an absolute mess and all over the place, you can't box it and the only way to hit the target is too stick your arms out in front, which it allows you to do, it's a con there is no boxing involved.
Could have beem great but as I said it's a mess, more so with the custom songs.

How hard can it be too space the targets out so you can box properly. Devs appear to have given up on it as well. Shame....presentation was good but they messed up something that was so easy not too!
The only thing I miss is to be able to create my own playlist, what is possible in Beat Saber. I know that I can sort the songs by number of plays, but that is not the same.
I love this game, but would love it even more if it had a more diverse song selection.  I like hard rock, metal, and some classic rock… there are not many songs that fall in those categories.
I really enjoy the game keeps you moving. It would be nice if there were a few more up to date songs though. It doesn't matter though I will keep playing the game. Thank you.
Love to play this game! As good as Beat Saber :)

I've been waiting for this to come up on the app lab. Had played the demo  and loved it  especially the funky dragon background.

The full game delivers  and more! Lots of options to keep you engaged. The manic calorie burner that is the club!

My main issue ( making 4 not 5 stars) is that I can't work out the staff at all. It just keeps switching hands even when I keep one behind my back.  A more thorough tutorial for each weapon style would be a bonus. As would an in game description of custom songs (though Google and reddit are there to help for that!)

Update: the Devs were immediately responsive to my bug report  and fixed it within two days. Absolutely superb customer service :)
It’s a fun game

reviews.review_title: fun rhythm game with a different feel
reviews.review_description: Really fun rhythm  game, on lower difficulties it works great for average to quick pace boxing. However on higher difficulties the speed of the notes cause the user to throw less punches and focus more on speed and reaction time. The beats sync up great with the songs. With the ability to add custom songs extremely easy through beat sage this is quickly become one of my go to apps for fun and for working out.  In regards to fitness between my watch and occulus move the game is averaging around 100-115 calories in about 20 minutes. However i try to stick to throw to boxing as much as possible, since the dont have directions you can make up your own combos depending on the placement of notes. Would 100% recomend to anyone looking for a rhythm  game, dont expect a clone of beat saber since this is not that.

This game is one of the more unique workouts I've found in VR and a go-to app for me. It looks and sounds extremely simple, but the developer has put so much heart and effort into it that it is both extremely challenging and a ton of fun to play

reviews.review_title: Makes you want to keep working out
reviews.review_description: I really like boxing/punching style exercise apps and have several.  When I first got my headset, I got beat saber, but honestly I like this one better and don't use the other anymore. Ability to add free custom songs from beast saber, etc. kicks a lot of the other options out of the water and the great music keeps you wanting to 'play' more.  I'm glad it is different from FitXR and the other apps. I want to focus on hitting the marks to the music and find I can hit them on a down or other swing (custom mapped songs sometimes require that), so adding directional arrows isn't something I want added.  I use other apps when I want more of a real 'boxing' feel, this is fun music based exercise app and I highly recommend it.  Only thing that I would love to have added is a daytime beach theme that would really inspire even more time in the app, but do love the dragon option.

Big  fan of these fitness apps and was intrigued by this one .love the workouts of varying difficulty. Also some really good tunes and good selection of backgrounds . A must have in everybody's game collection

Seriously, if this game isn't in your library, buy it now!!

The songs are great, the environments are pretty, and the workout is amazing!!

reviews.review_title: Amazing variety in the rythm genre!
reviews.review_description:
My first impressions of this game, from just booting and going to quick play, were insanely positive. I was given the knuckle duster gloves and it felt just like I was playing the old Box VR on PS VR!! 

     Afterwards I did the same song with the saber options and it was harder than a similar tempo in Beat Saber! I'm going to have to figure out the custom songs, as the initial library is rather limited unless you like the techno beats. 

5 stars and a mention that the future is looking bright indeed for this one.

WOW! This game is awesome!! While similar to other rythym games, it is actually unique. It has many different intensity levels so you can really get a workout on or just do some mild cardio. You can also box or choose a variety of weapons to use such as saws or blades and even choose a 360 mode. I can't wait to try them all! You can change the environments to some awesome scenes as well, but I find the underwater scene to be my favorite. I love that there is a calorie counter that is viewable so you can set goals for yourself. Lots of great upbeat tunes. Check this game out if you want to change up your VR workout!
I absolutely LOVE this game on saw mode....I played beat saber religiously until I discovered this game....now this is my go to for exercise.....kiddos to the developers and creators of this!

reviews.review_title: Awesome workout and love the game
reviews.review_description: I love the game! This game really get you sweating and I love the long songs in the club. The club is my favorite because I love to see the crowd keep dancing, lol. I have one issue; HOW DO YOU SWITCH WEAPONS? It was an option when I first downloaded the game but I want to use the swords/stick weapons now. PLEASE HELP!!!
